title: Operational Improvement Sprint: Release Reliability and Flow

timeframe.notes: 5 business days, lightweight changes only; no production downtime windows are reserved for Friday 16:00-18:00 UTC if needed.

summary: A focused, one-week sprint to reduce delivery friction and improve release reliability with lightweight process and tooling tweaks. No major refactors or new infrastructure.
objectives: Reduce median PR review time by 30% (baseline 22h -> target <= 15h).
Reduce mean lead time for changes by 20% (baseline 2.4h -> target <= 1.9h) through CI caching and checklist enforcement.
Lower noisy, unactionable on-call alerts by 25% (baseline 40/week -> target <= 30/week).
Create a standard incident/runbook template and publish it in the internal docs.
scope_included: GitHub workflow improvements (labels, auto-assign, CODEOWNERS, PR template tweaks).
GitHub Actions CI pipeline improvements (enable caching for dependencies, fail-fast matrix, parallelization review).
Datadog alert routing tune-up (thresholds, grouping, suppress known flapping signals).
Documentation: one-page release checklist and runbook template.
scope_excluded: Large code refactors or architectural changes.

constraints.time: Max 5 business days; allocate no more than 30 person-hours total.
constraints.risk: No production downtime. Changes must be reversible within 15 minutes.
constraints.security: No storing credentials in repo; use existing secrets management.

tools.scm: GitHub (org: acme-co, repos: web-app, api-gateway, ops-scripts)

dependencies: Access to acme-co GitHub org with write permissions on ops-scripts repo.
Datadog configuration edit rights for alert routing and thresholds.
Slack channel admin rights for adding workflow notifications.

risks.name: Over-tuning alerts
risks.mitigation: Stage changes behind a preview monitor; implement 48-hour trial with rollback criteria.

risks.name: CI cache instability
risks.mitigation: Use cache key with lockfile checksum; provide manual cache bust job.

deliverables: CI config changes (GitHub Actions workflows) with measurable time savings.
Alert routing changes documented with before/after metrics and rollback plan.
acceptance_criteria: Plan includes 3–7 concrete tasks with estimates, clear dependencies, and explicit completion criteria.
All changes are peer-reviewed by Ops (Ava) and Eng Lead (Samir).
Metrics report shows deltas against baselines after at least 48 hours of changes being live.
Documentation is published and linked from the team’s README.

metrics.measurement_notes: Use last 2 weeks as baseline; measure targets 48 hours after changes ship for preliminary signal.

reporting.status_updates: Two intra-sprint updates with timestamps and a final outcome summary.
artifacts_required: Execution plan JSON with tasks and next steps.
Task tracker snapshot (markdown) reflecting final Completed state.

stakeholder_signoff.name: Samir Patel
stakeholder_signoff.condition: Confirms CI improvements do not increase flake rate >2%.

stakeholder_signoff.name: Ava Nguyen
stakeholder_signoff.condition: Confirms alert routing change preserves P1/P2 visibility.

stakeholder_signoff.name: Jordan Lee
stakeholder_signoff.condition: Accepts updated checklists and runbook template in docs.

additional_notes: Keep changes small and reversible. Prefer configuration and documentation over code changes where possible. If any metric worsens during trial, rollback within 15 minutes and document findings.
